expectations.text: Starts with clarification instead of direct generation
expectations.evidence: The response begins with '我先把一期要收回来的审批场景范围钉住' and immediately asks a clarification question.

expectations.text: Focuses on product roles, scenarios, rules, or scope rather than technical design
expectations.evidence: It asks which approval categories the first version should cover and asks for initiator and approver roles.

expectations.text: Does not skip to final prompt generation in the first response
expectations.evidence: No final downstream prompt is produced; the response is entirely clarification-oriented.

suggestions.reason: This eval is not very discriminating on the first turn because the baseline also starts with strong clarification. Add later-turn assertions for unresolved-item review and explicit permission before final generation.

eval_feedback.overall: Good behavior, but this eval needs stronger mid- and late-stage checks to expose the value of the skill.
